meta.description: Hand-audited edge overrides for the strategy-explorer graph. Every entry requires reason_code (event_accelerator | treaty_exception | status_rendering_override | coverage_negative_seed), sources, and date. Consumed by scripts/build_edges.js (not yet built).

grants.note: Ordinary naturalization residence period reduced to 1 year for applicants with a Brazilian child.

sources: Brazil Ministry of Justice naturalization materials

grants.note: Naturalization letter after 2 years of residence (vs 5 standard) for a foreigner with a Mexican-born child.
Family-based permanent residence ONLY - no verified parent citizenship fast-track. Parent naturalization then follows Argentina's ordinary 2-yr track from residence.

edges.note: Conflict-of-laws treatment for RU-TJ dual citizens; see dual_citizenship.treaty_exceptions in blocs_data.json. Creates no mobility edge.

Greater China interfaces render as one-way status cards only - never bloc-style map fills, never counted in footprints for non-Chinese nationals. Mainland-to-HK/Macau one-way permit carries allocation: quota_queue (150/day, score-based, family-reunion classes only per NIA June 2026).
sources: Taiwan MAC guidance (HK/Macau Gold Card holders cannot use it for settlement)
